---
title: "Scotty Dawg"
image: images/profile.png
about:
  template: trestles
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: Linkedin
      href: https://www.linkedin.com
    - icon: bluesky
      text: Bluesky
      href: https://bsky.app
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com
toc: false
---

Hi, and welcome to my website!

## Education

Carnegie Mellon University | Pittsburgh, PA |
PhD in Statistics | 2024 - 2029 *(expected)*

## Experience

Summer Undergraduate Research Experience in Statistics: Sports Analytics (CMSACamp) | Summer 2026
